tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — extend types and mapChannelUserSummary
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Type the new fields (staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName) on ChannelUserSummaryRow, ChannelWithUnread.otherUser, ChannelMemberResponse.user; add derivation logic in mapChannelUserSummary; cover all four mapping cases with unit tests. No query changes yet.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts (lines 54-67, 69-93, 95-105, 193-208)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** cd apps/server && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=channels.service.spec

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/server && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=channels.service.spec","acceptanceCriteria":["ChannelUserSummaryRow includes botExtra, ownerDisplayName, ownerUsername","mapChannelUserSummary returns staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName per spec rules","ChannelWithUnread.otherUser and ChannelMemberResponse.user types include the three new fields","All seven new mapping unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — wire query joins and bump Redis cache key
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add aliased owner-user join + select bots.extra in both getUserChannels::allMembers and getDmOtherUser. Bump CHANNEL_DM_OTHER_USER cache key to v2.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts (lines 917-952, 1037-1075, plus alias() import + module-level const)
- Modify: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/shared/constants/redis-keys.ts (line 15-16)
- Possibly Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/index.ts (re-export alias if missing)
- Test: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts (extend getUserChannels fixture)

**Verify:** cd apps/server && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=channels.service.spec

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/shared/constants/redis-keys.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/server && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=channels.service.spec","acceptanceCriteria":["Both query sites select bots.extra and ownerUser displayName/username via aliased users join","getUserChannels integration test asserts otherUser.staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName for a bot DM","Redis key is im:channel_dm_other:v2:<channelId>:<userId>","All existing channels.service.spec tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Frontend — extend ChannelOtherUser type
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName as optional fields to all four user-summary-shaped interfaces in apps/client/src/types/im.ts (lines 87, 122, 194, 357).

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/types/im.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["All four otherUser/member-user shapes include staffKind, roleTitle, ownerName as optional","pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend — add i18n strings to all 12 locales
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add agentPillAi, agentPillPersonalAssistant, agentPillModel keys to navigation.json for de, en, es, fr, it, ja, ko, nl, pt, ru, zh-CN, zh-TW. Reuse existing personalAssistant value per locale; localize Model.

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck (and JSON syntax validation)

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/i18n/locales/de/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/en/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/es/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/fr/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/it/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/ja/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/ko/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/nl/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/pt/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/ru/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN/navigation.json","apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-TW/navigation.json"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["All 12 navigation.json files contain agentPillAi/PersonalAssistant/Model keys","agentPillAi == AI in every locale","agentPillPersonalAssistant matches existing personalAssistant value per locale","agentPillModel localized per Step 2 list"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Frontend — create AgentPillRow component with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create AgentPillRow.tsx and __tests__/AgentPillRow.test.tsx. Cover all 4 staffKind branches plus truncation behavior.

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm test -- AgentPillRow

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/components/sidebar/AgentPillRow.tsx","apps/client/src/components/sidebar/__tests__/AgentPillRow.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm test -- AgentPillRow","acceptanceCriteria":["AgentPillRow renders correct pill set for common (with/without roleTitle), personal (with/without ownerName), other","Variable-content pills use truncate max-w-[12ch] and title attr","AI pill uses accent (bg-primary/15 text-primary), others use neutral (bg-nav-hover)","All 6 unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — extend UserListItem to render AgentPillRow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName props to UserListItem; render AgentPillRow when isBot && staffKind; otherwise preserve subtitle behavior. Add agent-pills test file.

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm test -- UserListItem

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/components/sidebar/UserListItem.tsx","apps/client/src/components/sidebar/__tests__/UserListItem.agentPills.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm test -- UserListItem","acceptanceCriteria":["UserListItem accepts staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName","isBot && staffKind => AgentPillRow renders, subtitle suppressed","isBot && !staffKind || !isBot => subtitle preserved","All 8 new tests pass; existing UserListItem.size.test.tsx and UserListItem.avatar.test.tsx still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend — wire DM sub-sidebars to pass agent fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName off channel.otherUser in MessagesSubSidebar.tsx and HomeSubSidebar.tsx and pass through to <UserListItem>.

**Verify:** cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern="SubSidebar|UserListItem|AgentPillRow"

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/MessagesSubSidebar.tsx","apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/HomeSubSidebar.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps/client && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test -- --testPathPattern=\"SubSidebar|UserListItem|AgentPillRow\"","acceptanceCriteria":["Both sub-sidebars derive staffKind/roleTitle/ownerName from channel.otherUser","Both pass new props to UserListItem","No new typecheck errors; existing sub-sidebar tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Manual verification in pnpm dev
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Visually confirm correct pill rendering for all four agent kinds (common w/ roleTitle, common w/o roleTitle, personal staff, OpenClaw/base-model bot) plus human DM unchanged. Test long-roleTitle truncation.

**Verify:** Manual inspection in pnpm dev

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"pnpm dev","acceptanceCriteria":["Common bot w/ roleTitle shows AI + role pills","Common bot w/o roleTitle shows only AI pill","Personal staff shows AI + 个人助理 + ownerName","OpenClaw/base-model bot shows AI + 模型","Human DM rows unchanged","No console errors","Long role title truncates with title-attr tooltip"]}
```
